preprocessing_steps.Description: Bandpass 8-70 Hz (5th order Butterworth), 60 Hz notch filter (to remove line noise), EOG artifact removal (adaptive filtering), Downsampled from 1000 Hz to 256 Hz

TaskDescription: Auditory beep + visual cue. 5 beeps at T=1.0s rhythm. Subject imagines speech at each beep and continues for 3 more periods. Analyzed segment: after last beep. Each 5s trial is split into 3 overlapping epochs of 2s. Trial duration: 2.0s, cue: 7.0s, imagery: 5.0s.
InstitutionalDepartmentName: School for Engineering of Matter, Transport and Energy
Description: Imagined speech EEG dataset. Paper reports 49.0+/-2.4% mean accuracy.
